required_points: Names a concrete invalidation strategy (TTL, explicit invalidation on write, write-through)
Frames staleness as a trade-off against load and latency
Identifies cache stampede / thundering herd as a new failure mode
strong_signals: Mentions stampede protection (locking, request coalescing, jittered TTLs)
Versioned cache keys to make invalidation atomic
red_flags: Cache with no invalidation story at all
